narrative:
East Union Township has 2,903 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
